features: OdourClear Technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent
Spray it all around the house to fight odours and freshen
Available in a wide range of fragrances
description: Febreze Air Freshener Spray with OdourClear Technology fights tough lingering odours and leaves a fresh scent. Discover Exotic Bloom, a blend of serene countryside, flowers and fruit trees where blushes of peach blossom contrast with the floral brushstrokes of bewitching Rose de Mai and Freesia. Spray it all around the house to fight odours and freshen. Febreze Air Freshener is non-flammable and is available in a wide range of fragrances.
